# Reinforcement: <feature-id>

- Status: pending | ready | complete
- Last Updated: YYYY-MM-DD

## 1. Grounded Sources

- source path or request excerpt

## 2. Consistency Checks

- pack vs standards
- pack vs code
- contract or schema checks

## 3. Ambiguities

- unknown fact
- why it matters
- current handling

## 4. Risks

- risk
- impact
- mitigation

## 5. Stop Conditions

- what must block implementation or review

## 6. Confidence

- high | medium | low
- short reason
